Title: dt_set_tz
Description: modifies the timezone component of a datetime

This modifies the timezone component of a datetime.
    The value remains equal for purposes of comparison but will look
    different when converted to a string.  The  timezone component is an
    offset from UTC in minutes. It can be retrieved with the timezone
    function.

Timezoneless: The function returns its first argument with unchanged GMT value but new timezone offset. Unlike adjust_timezone() , if the argument is timezoneless then no
    	error is signaled.
